glosses.ja: どれくらい; いくつ

sentences.target: Je te demande combien ça coûte.

translations.fr: Je te demande combien ça coûte.
translations.en: I'm asking you how much it costs.
translations.de: Ich frage dich, wie viel es kostet.
translations.ru: Я спрашиваю тебя, сколько это стоит.
translations.he: אני שואל אותך כמה זה עולה.
translations.tr: Sana fiyatının ne kadar olduğunu soruyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang hỏi bạn nó giá bao nhiêu.
translations.nl: Ik vraag je hoeveel het kost.
translations.uk: Я питаю тебе, скільки це коштує.
translations.hi: मैं तुमसे पूछ रहा हूँ कि इसकी कीमत कितनी है.
translations.nb: Jeg spør deg hvor mye det koster.
translations.sv: Jag frågar dig hur mycket det kostar.
translations.cs: Ptám se tě, kolik to stojí.
translations.da: Jeg spørger dig, hvor meget det koster.
translations.ja: いくらか聞いています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; clitic in preverbal position.
2nd-person singular object pronoun; indirect object (recipient) with 'demande'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular agreeing with 'Je'.
Interrogative adverb of quantity introducing an embedded question.
Demonstrative pronoun functioning as subject of 'coûte'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular with subject 'ça'.

sentences.target: Tu sais combien de temps ça prend.
sentences.reading: /ty sɛ kɔ̃bjɛ̃ də tɑ̃ sa pʁɑ̃/

translations.fr: Tu sais combien de temps ça prend.
translations.ipa: /ty sɛ kɔ̃bjɛ̃ də tɑ̃ sa pʁɑ̃/
translations.en: You know how long it takes.
translations.de: Du weißt, wie lange es dauert.
translations.ru: Ты знаешь, сколько времени это занимает.
translations.he: אתה יודע כמה זמן זה לוקח.
translations.vi: Bạn biết nó mất bao lâu.
translations.nl: Je weet hoe lang het duurt.
translations.uk: Ти знаєш, скільки часу це займає.
translations.hi: तुम जानते हो कि इसमें कितना समय लगता है.
translations.nb: Du vet hvor lang tid det tar.
translations.id: Kamu tahu berapa lama itu berlangsung.
translations.sv: Du vet hur lång tid det tar.
translations.da: Du ved, hvor lang tid det tager.
translations.ja: どれくらい時間がかかるか知っています。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; selects an embedded interrogative clause.
Interrogative adverb of quantity modifying the embedded clause; pairs with 'de' + noun.
Preposition in the fixed pattern 'combien de' introducing the measure noun.
Mass/common noun serving as the complement of 'de' in 'combien de temps'.
Demonstrative pronoun used as subject of 'prend'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular with subject 'ça'.

sentences.target: Dis-moi combien de pommes tu veux.
sentences.reading: /di mwa kɔ̃bjɛ̃ də pɔm ty vø/

translations.fr: Dis-moi combien de pommes tu veux.
translations.ipa: /di mwa kɔ̃bjɛ̃ də pɔm ty vø/
translations.en: Tell me how many apples you want.
translations.de: Sag mir, wie viele Äpfel du möchtest.
translations.ko: 사과를 몇 개 원하는지 말해 주세요.
translations.zh-Hans: 告诉我你要多少个苹果。
translations.yue: 同我講你要幾多個蘋果。
translations.ru: Скажи мне, сколько яблок ты хочешь.
translations.pt: Me diga quantas maçãs você quer.
translations.he: תגיד לי כמה תפוחים אתה רוצה.
translations.vi: Hãy nói cho tôi bạn muốn bao nhiêu quả táo.
translations.nl: Zeg me hoeveel appels je wilt.
translations.uk: Скажи мені, скільки яблук ти хочеш.
translations.hi: मुझे बताओ कि तुम्हें कितने सेब चाहिए.
translations.nb: Si meg hvor mange epler du vil ha.
translations.id: Beri tahu saya berapa banyak apel yang kamu mau.
translations.sv: Säg mig hur många äpplen du vill ha.
translations.da: Fortæl mig, hvor mange æbler du vil have.
translations.fi: Kerro minulle, kuinka monta omenaa haluat.
translations.ja: りんごを何個欲しいか教えてください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2nd person singular; verb of saying issuing a directive.
Tonic/object pronoun used with affirmative imperative; indirect object of 'Dis'.
Interrogative adverb of quantity; selects 'de' + count noun to ask a number.
Preposition linking 'combien' to the quantified noun.
Common noun, plural; complement of 'de' in 'combien de pommes'.
2nd-person singular subject pronoun of the embedded clause.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; takes the quantified object understood from context.

sentences.target: Je note combien de personnes viennent.

translations.fr: Je note combien de personnes viennent.
translations.en: I'm noting how many people are coming.
translations.de: Ich notiere, wie viele Leute kommen.
translations.ko: 얼마나 많은 사람이 오는지 적고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在记录有多少人会来。
translations.vi: Tôi đang ghi lại có bao nhiêu người sẽ đến.
translations.hi: मैं नोट कर रहा हूँ कि कितने लोग आ रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Jeg noterer hvor mange som kommer.
translations.id: Saya mencatat berapa banyak orang yang akan datang.
translations.sv: Jag antecknar hur många som kommer.
translations.da: Jeg noterer, hvor mange der kommer.
translations.fi: Kirjaan ylös, kuinka monta ihmistä on tulossa.
translations.ja: 何人来るのかメモしています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular.
Interrogative adverb introducing a content clause about quantity; pairs with 'de' + noun.
Preposition linking 'combien' to the quantified noun.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of 'de' in 'combien de personnes'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; agrees with 'personnes' in the embedded clause.

Tu sais combien de temps ça prend.
Dis-moi combien de pommes tu veux.
Je note combien de personnes viennent.

You know how long it takes.
Tell me how many apples you want.
I'm noting how many people are coming.
